response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most recent roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; while he has a brief C++ stint at National Instruments over a decade ago, there is no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or IoT protocol exposure required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Demonstrated ability to work in agile, test-driven environments
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development in the last 9+ years
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or MQTT/Modbus protocols
No demonstrable experience with on-premises industrial automation platforms or cloud-native industrial solutions
